pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Zach's dreams of Brazilian samba are dancin' right out the door.** Mustard Boy thought pickin' Brazil guaranteed him samba football and smooth passes, but he's been watchin' too much telenovela, forgettin' this ain't a novela, it's a grind. Meanwhile, Bubba G over here is backin' Morocco like his fortune teller whispered sweet nothings about North African flair into his ear. Brazil's got history, sure, but Morocco ain't just showin' up to be a practice squad. In East Rutherford, with Zach's luck, the only thing Brazil's dancin' with is defeat. Morocco's gonna play surprise party crashers, and Mustard Boy's left gettin' cooked like a Texas summer BBQ. Watch out, 'cause Bubba G's crew is ready to flip the script, leavin' Zach scratchin' his head and wonderin' why he didn't back that oil money for more than goals.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Brazil and Switzerland Teams Poised for Underwhelming Performances
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy banking on Swiss precision after Brazil's shaky drafts.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner Bets on Tier 3 Canada as France Faces Draft Doubts
pundit_takes.subtitle: Bubba G confident despite Canada's draw; France feeling the pressure.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin's Low-Profile Haiti Hopes to Shine Against Undrafted Scotland
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper's strategy: surprise upsets, trusting the power of anonymity.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden's Top-Ranked Management Style Relies on Turkey's Unexpected Strengths
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Backpass Assassin rides the wave of a tier 3 powerhouse.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach's still ziplocked at zero points, the Czeching account needs a boost.
Rafe's draft decisions make a wrecking ball look like a precision tool.
Devin's -3 against Rafe — the kid's sending him back to math class.
Sim's got Rafe competitive; is there a glitch in the Matrix?
